scenario_description: The user wants to calculate a total for the sales spreadsheet but doesn't specify which column or row. The agent asks, then adds a Total row with SUM formulas at the bottom.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me calculate the total for this data
Add a new row at the bottom: write "Total" in the first column, and use SUM formulas for each month column, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/SalesRep.xlsx'); col0 = df.iloc[:, 0].astype(str); print('PASSED' if col0.str.contains('Total', case=False).any() else 'FAILED')"
